docs.title: Build Elite Technical Organizations
docs.text:
Platypus partners with ambitious companies to solve the hard problems of building technical teams that ship.

Whether you need to design a hiring system, structure your engineering org, navigate strategic technical decisions, or have someone who can actually build—we've done it at scale.

Founded by Palantir veterans. 7 years running Forward Deployed Engineering. 600+ technical interviews. Hands-on keyboard when it matters.

Featured in The Pragmatic Engineer on building Forward Deployed Engineering organizations

docs.title: Strategic Partnership
docs.text:
• FDE Organization Building: Design and implement Palantir-style forward deployed engineering organizations. We help you structure teams around customer outcomes, define operating models, and build the culture of ownership that makes FDEs effective.
  • Hiring System Design: End-to-end hiring process design tailored to your company's needs. From defining core traits to building interview kits to training your team. You own the system forever.
  • The Hiring Blueprint: See our work: Comand AI case study, Northslope Technologies case study
  • Fractional CTO / Technical Advisory: Strategic guidance for technical decisions, architecture choices, and engineering leadership. Especially valuable for teams working with Palantir Foundry or navigating complex technical transformations.

docs.title: Hands-On Delivery
docs.text:
When strategic advice isn't enough, we build:

  • Generative AI Applications: LLM-based products, fine-tuning pipelines, evaluation frameworks
  • Palantir Foundry Implementation: Custom applications, data pipelines, production deployments
  • Blockchain Development: Data archival systems, Web3 infrastructure
  • Computational Physics: Simulation development, numerical methods, scientific computing

Recent work: Rebuilding gyrokinetics simulations with AI—testing intelligence explosion through active research.

docs.title: Interviewing as a Service
docs.text:
On-demand expert interview capacity to scale your hiring without draining your engineers.

What's included:

  • Technical and behavioral interviews conducted by our Palantir/Google-trained team
  • Detailed candidate reports with clear hire/no-hire recommendations
  • 24-hour turnaround

docs.title: Why These Services Together?
docs.text:
Building great technical organizations requires three things:

  1. The right people — Elite hiring systems that actually work
  2. The right structure — Organizations that align around outcomes, not org charts
  3. Technical credibility — Leaders who can still code, still architect, still debug production

Most consultancies offer one. Almost none understand all three. We've lived it at Palantir, Protocol Labs, and our own ventures.

We're not ex-engineers advising from the sidelines. We're current practitioners who understand organizational design.

docs.title: Ready to Build Something?
docs.text:
For hiring & organizational design or technical projects Book a consultation: work@platypustech.xyz

Connect on LinkedIn linkedin.com/in/anjor-kanekar

docs.title: Anjor Kanekar
docs.text:
Founder

Anjor spent 7 years at Palantir as a Forward Deployed Engineer and hiring manager, conducting 600+ technical interviews and training hundreds of interviewers. He ran FDE hiring for commercial and UK businesses, building the systems that identified exceptional engineers at scale.

Before founding Platypus, Anjor led engineering teams at Protocol Labs (onboarding 2+ petabytes to Filecoin) and served as Head of Applied AI Research at Radiant AI.

He holds a PhD in Computational Physics from the University of Maryland and remains an active researcher—currently rebuilding gyrokinetics simulations using AI-assisted development.

LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/anjor-kanekar GitHub: github.com/anjor Writing: anjor.xyz/writing

docs.title: Our Bench
docs.text:
For Interviewing as a Service and larger engagements, we work with a carefully curated bench of senior engineers, all trained in Palantir-style interviewing:

  • Ex-Palantir FDEs with 5+ years of technical interviewing experience
  • Ex-Google/Amazon engineers with hiring manager experience
  • Domain specialists for specific technical areas

All bench members are calibrated to our standards and provide structured, detailed candidate assessments.

Interested in joining our bench? Get in touch.
